# cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_region (Data Source)

Used to retrieve a Public Cloud VM Instances region, by `id` or by `name`.

To query this datasource you will need the `public_cloud_vm_instances_read` role.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Retrieve a region by name.
data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_region" "fr1" {
  name = "fr1"
}

# Or by id.
data "cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_region" "by_id" {
  id = "ed8bb3eb-a64c-46de-884f-65a5ea7d14c7"
}

output "region_country" {
  value = data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_region.fr1.country_code
}

output "region_az_count" {
  value = data.cloudtemple_public_cloud_vm_region.fr1.az_count
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the region to retrieve. Conflicts with `name`.
- `name` (String) The name of the region to retrieve (e.g. `fr1`). Conflicts with `id`.

### Read-Only

- `az_count` (Number) The number of availability zones in the region.
- `country_code` (String) The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the region.
- `created_at` (String) The creation date of the region (RFC3339).
- `description` (String) The human-readable description of the region.
- `geography` (String) The geography the region belongs to (e.g. `Europe`).
- `is_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the region is enabled for the tenant.
- `updated_at` (String) The last update date of the region (RFC3339).
